# Best Open Source Community Tools for Developers in 2026 Today

Meta description: A roundup of open source community tools for developers in 2026, covering what they do well and where they fall short.
Slug: open-source-community-tools-developers-2026
Alt text: Terminal showing an open source community tool being installed
Category: Community
Tags: Community, App Growth
Minutes to read: 6

Open source community tools for developers have matured fast in the last two years. This list covers what we use and recommend.

## Installing the toolkit

The fastest way to get started is via the CLI:

```bash
# Install the CLI first
npm install -g community-cli
## then initialise your workspace
community-cli init my-space
```

That command set gets you a running workspace in under a minute.

## What it gives you out of the box

Standard moderation, role assignment, and a basic feed.
